title: Blueprint Swarm - Product Synthesis
description: Cross-call product gap analysis synthesizing feature requests, pain points, and their impact on churn and revenue

gap.description: Concise description of the product gap or missing feature (e.g., 'Native Salesforce integration', 'Custom reporting dashboards', 'SSO/SAML support')

directly_caused_churn.description: Number of accounts where this gap was the primary churn reason

contributed_to_churn.description: Number of accounts where this gap was a contributing factor to churn

mentioned_but_not_causal.description: Number of accounts that mentioned this gap but did not churn because of it

churn_attribution.description: How strongly this gap is linked to churn

revenue_impact.description: Estimated total ARR impact (churned + at-risk) attributable to this gap (null if revenue data unavailable)

customer_quotes.description: Verbatim quotes from customers about this product gap

affected_segments.description: Customer segments most affected by this gap (e.g., 'Enterprise', 'Healthcare vertical', '$50K+ ARR accounts')

first_mentioned.description: Earliest date this gap was mentioned in the dataset (YYYY-MM-DD)

trend.description: Whether mentions of this gap are increasing, stable, or decreasing over time

product_gaps.description: Product gaps ranked by churn attribution and revenue impact
